name: useCurrentSession
description: Returns the active session state from the `SessionContext`.
usage_guidelines: Used by UI components that require knowledge of the current authenticated user's session.
Relies on a parent `NavigationProvider` or `AuthProvider` managing the `SessionContext`.

return_value.description: The current user session context payload.

Do: Use strictly on the client-side within components.
Guard UI layers based on session presence.
Dont: Do not attempt to use inside Next.js Server Components.
